text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You go to games pretty regularly, right?<n>I need a
teammate, so I figured you'd be<n>the one to ask!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I happened to hear you talking to<n>Golshi, that's
all! ♪ A fan like you<n>must've played a game or
two, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Well, you're not exactly wrong...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Then let's play! That should be just as<n>fun as
watching, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Especially when you hit the ball! The<n>sound of the
metal bat colliding with the<n>ball is the best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
W-well... I suppose you leave me with no<n>choice
but to—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yippee! We needed an umpire to play,<n>so this is
perfect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umpire?! Now hold on! The umpire<n>doesn't get to
hit the ball at all!
